target_sites.name: mlbprediction
target_sites.angle: Analytics, advanced stats (xBA, WAR, xFIP), data-driven

target_sites.name: bestmlbhandicapper
target_sites.angle: Sharp money, expert handicapping, situational angles

news_items.headline: Longtime Mets broadcaster Howie Rose to retire after season
news_items.description: Longtime Mets broadcaster Howie Rose announced Thursday he is planning to retire at the end of the season after spending four decades with the organization.

news_items.headline: World Baseball Classic's success may lead to midseason tournament
news_items.description: MLB commissioner Rob Manfred says the continued growth and success of the World Baseball Classic could lead to a midseason competition in the future.

news_items.headline: MLB reaches agreements with Polymarket, federal commission
news_items.description: MLB has named Polymarket as the league's official prediction market exchange and announced an information sharing agreement with the CFTC, the federal body that oversees the growing industry.

news_items.headline: The 2026 ESPN Fantasy Baseball draft guide: Rankings, tips, stats, strategy and more
news_items.description: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball: The perfect first two picks for every draft position
news_items.description: Tristan H. Cockcroft and Eric Karabell reveal the ideal outcome for the first two rounds of a 10-team draft from any starting draft position.

news_items.headline: How Athletics DH Brent Rooker became an All-Star slugger
news_items.description: The designated hitter struggled early in his career -- but he's now a powerhouse hitter and crucial vocal leader in a young A's clubhouse.
